Name: Cat
Title: PROJECTS
Description: A collection of projects from my entire programming journey, showing progress from early experiments to more complex systems.
Suffix: Navigation: +link +link +link

Name: SintlucasChatroom
Title: CHATROOM
Description: Team-based school project: a real-time chatroom web app with customizable styling options.
Suffix: The repository cannot be shared publicly because it is based on a school fork. The focus of the project was UI customization and client-side functionality. +link

Name: CurrentDunge
Title: "Dunge" Dungeon crawler game
Description: Dungeon crawler built in Processing (Java), focusing on gameplay systems and engine structure.
Suffix: GitHub is private, but I’m documenting the project in a Markdown breakdown and posting development updates on YouTube. +link

Name: 3DPlatformerWithLanMultiplayer
Title: 3D PLATFORMER IN THE C# CONSOLE APP WITH LAN MULTIPLAYER
Details: This is a tool I made for turning .bbmodels into models, animation and rigs files for my engine
resources/tool.png
I was also working on adding immersive portal, which turned out to be successful
resources/portal.gif
Physics system: AABB collision detection with velocity-based movement
Rendering system: multi-layer rendering where everything is drawn to a depth-buffered field, then built up into lines and triangles
Models, rigs and animations are parsed from custom file formats into runtime structures stored in dictionaries for rendering
Entity system uses a central update loop where each entity type has its own update and render methods
Portal system uses dual cameras and offset rendering to simulate portal views
Description: Custom 3D platformer engine built in a C# console environment. Includes movement systems, enemies, a text-based rendering pipeline, file parsing tools, and LAN multiplayer using TCP networking.
Suffix: Developed during early C# experience (5–7 months), heavily focused on engine design, networking, and system architecture. +link

Name: PizzaShop
Title: PIZZA SHOP
Description: School webshop project with cart system, JSON-based products, and persistent cart state across reloads.
Suffix: Cart system with dynamic price calculation and persistent state. +link +link

Name: Portfolio
Title: PORTFOLIO
Description: This portfolio website. Projects are generated dynamically from structured JSON using JavaScript, making it easy to add or modify entries.
Suffix: +link

Name: WireframePlatformer
Title: 3D WIREFRAME PLATFORMER
Description: Early 3D wireframe platformer built in a console-based rendering system.
Suffix: Includes moving platforms, disappearing platforms, checkpoints, and an infinite progression system. +link
Details: On the topic of 3D, this is a raycaster I also made in the console app
resources/raycaster.png

Name: FinalAssignment
Title: SIMPLE FIGHTING GAME
Description: Turn-based fighting game with item systems, procedural generation, and progression-based combat.
Suffix: Includes stats, classes, scaling enemies, and progression-based rewards. +link

Name: MusicGame
Title: MUSIC MIXING GAME
Description: Audio-based game where different sound layers are enabled and disabled to create music.
Suffix: Includes stereo positioning where sound direction is controlled through input-based channel routing.

Name: OperatingSystem
Title: SIMULATED OPERATING SYSTEM
Description: Experimental simulated operating system exploring system-like architecture and application handling.
Suffix: Includes early app store concept with plans for online integration.

Name: ChatApp
Title: ONLINE CHAT APP
Description: Early networking-based chat app with custom emojis, encoded images, and formatted text rendering.
Suffix: Includes custom text rendering engine, formatting system, and early experimentation with networking and data encoding.

Name: PMSalesGame
Title: SALES GAME
Description: Business simulation game focused on trends, inflation, and resource management.
Suffix: Includes economy simulation, competitor interactions, and win/loss conditions based on financial performance.

Name: Portal
Title: VISUAL PORTAL EFFECT
Description: Prototype exploring portal-based rendering and spatial visualization.

Name: 2DWorldGenerator
Title: 2D WORLD GENERATION
Description: Procedural 2D world generator inspired by terrain systems and cellular simulation concepts.
Details: A similar project to this
resources/topdownworldgeneration.png
Grid-based simulation using neighbor averaging to generate terrain-like patterns mapped to colors
Suffix: Includes terrain types like sand, grass, dirt, stone, water, and air, with simple biome rules. +link

Name: PlantGrowth
Description: Procedural plant growth simulation based on L-system style rules.

Name: SalesGame
Description: Prototype trading game focused on buying and selling mechanics in a simulated economy.

Name: RagdollGame
Title: RAGDOLL PHYSICS GAME

Suffix: Includes limb-based damage, power-ups, and sound effects. +link

Name: Dunge

Name: Sales

Name: CarGame
